REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (9 Burlwood Drive, San Francisco)
Off Calendar Aug-18-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Christine Witherspoon.

The sale was confirmed at $1,010,000.00, the Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court). An additional bond in the amount of $568,000.00 is required.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Guitron.

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Apr-21-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Chong Woods (Conservatee); Larry Siracusa for and with Christine Witherspoon (Conservator). Janet Boessnecker for John Woods (Conservatee). Jung Suk Woods daughter is also present.

Mr. Siracusa stated that all the alternatives to obtain revenue were explored, that there was no equity on the subject property, and that sale of the property was the only resource. The proceeds from the sale will allow him to seek a rental property to re-unite the Woods under a home situation with an extra bedroom for family members and care takers to stay. Ms. Witherspoon stated that Mr. Woods is currently enrolled in a long term medical benefits and that there are no funds in the trust except the subject property and that the initial payment of 6 to 7 thousand dollars was required at the Los Altos care home. Mr. Siracusa added that it would take about 3 months to market the property, to confirm the sale and that Mr. Woods would lose his Medicare status. After the Court heard from Song Ku Yi (son in-law) through Si Young Ha as Korean Interpreter, the Petition to list and sell the real property was granted. Order signed in open court.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy R. Guitron.
